files.notes: This file contains the four Guide Lessons for May 1922. Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content. The lessons cover Theology/Forgiveness, Work/Business, Literature/Hymns, and Social Service/Home Leadership. The file also contains extensive advertisements at the end which should be preserved with the last lesson.
